data.name: Premium Wax and Polish
data.description:
For those who want to give their car a brilliant shine while protecting the paint from dirt, water, and contaminants. Restores paint to its best possible condition.

Long-lasting paint protection against scratches and marks.

data.name: Underbody Wash
data.description:
The Underbody Wash focuses on cleaning dirt and salt buildup from the chassis, exhaust system, suspension, and wheels.

Key Features: Prevention of rust and corrosion.

data.name: Ceramic Coating Protection
data.description: The Ceramic Coating Protection shields your car from contaminants, making it easier to clean and maintain. It also provides a deep gloss finish and maximum protection from the elements.

data.name: Basic Exterior Wash
data.description: Thorough exterior cleaning including foam wash, wheel cleaning, and drying for a fresh look.

data.name: Interior Deep Cleaning
data.description: Complete interior detailing: vacuuming, shampooing seats & carpets, dashboard conditioning, and window cleaning.

data.name: Headlight Restoration
data.description: Restores cloudy headlights to crystal clear condition, improving visibility and appearance.

data.name: Full Detailing Package
data.description: Complete car care: exterior wash, interior cleaning, wax, tire dressing, and engine bay cleaning.

data.name: Engine Bay Cleaning
data.description: Professional cleaning and degreasing of the engine bay for better performance and aesthetics.

data.name: Paint Protection Film (PPF)
data.description: High-quality paint protection film installation on vulnerable areas to guard against rock chips and scratches.

data.name: Tire & Wheel Detailing
data.description: Deep cleaning of wheels, tires, and applying premium tire dressing for that showroom finish.
